_description: Culture-independent biological anchors for PAD (Pleasure-Arousal-Dominance) sensor centroids. P and A axes are grounded in neuroscience. D axis is grounded in polyvagal theory. Cultural overlay is optional and additive.

P_axis.name: Valence (Pleasure)
P_axis.biological_substrate: Amygdala + nucleus accumbens + medial prefrontal cortex
P_axis.culture_independence: HIGH — amygdala threat response and reward circuitry are conserved across all mammals. LeDoux (1996, 2015) demonstrated fear conditioning is universal; Berridge (2003) distinguished wanting (dopamine) from liking (opioid) circuits, both culture-independent.

A_axis.name: Arousal (Activation)
A_axis.biological_substrate: Sympathetic nervous system + HPA axis + locus coeruleus
A_axis.culture_independence: HIGH — autonomic arousal (heart rate, skin conductance, cortisol) is physiologically universal. Fight/flight sympathetic activation is the same across cultures, species, and developmental stages.

D_axis.name: Dominance (Control / Agency)
D_axis.biological_substrate: Periaqueductal gray (PAG) + anterior cingulate cortex + dorsal striatum
D_axis.culture_independence: MEDIUM — the PAG mediates three universal response modes (fight/flight/freeze) which define the D axis neurologically. Which mode is activated by a given trigger is culturally modulated, but the modes themselves and their D-axis positions are biologically fixed.
D_axis.polyvagal_hierarchy: Porges (2011): ventral vagal (social) > sympathetic (fight/flight) > dorsal vagal (freeze/shutdown). This hierarchy is universal — only the trigger threshold is culturally variable.

fear.culture_independence: P and A are universal (amygdala + sympathetic NS). D depends on PAG mode activated.
fear.cultural_overlay: High power-distance cultures shift D toward freeze (-D). Individualist/warrior cultures shift D toward fight (+D). Cultural context sets PAG threshold, not PAG response.
fear.biological_anchor: Ohman & Mineka 2001 — fear is evolutionarily prepared. Universal P/A profile. Ekman 1992 cross-cultural fear recognition >85%.
fear.octa_state_core: 1 (low P) + 2 (high A) — D determines final state resolution
fear.corrupted_signal: Chronic low-grade fear decoupled from actual threat: P=-0.4, A=+0.3, D=-0.5 — same direction but dampened. Distinguishable by lack of acute onset and absence of real threat vector.

anger.culture_independence: HIGH for P and A. D is high because anger is the fight PAG mode — active boundary assertion, not freeze.
anger.cultural_overlay: Cultures with strong honor norms lower the trigger threshold for anger (more easily activated) but don't change the P/A/D profile once activated.
anger.biological_anchor: Blair 2004 — amygdala + vmPFC circuit. Sympathetic arousal + approach motivation = high A, high D. Distinct from fear (which has low D in freeze mode).
anger.octa_state_core: 2 (+y, high arousal) with positive D shift toward state 4
anger.corrupted_signal: Rumination: P=-0.55, A=+0.30, D=+0.20 — anger without the activation spike. No real boundary violation present.

grief.culture_independence: HIGH — attachment theory (Bowlby 1969) is universal. Loss of attachment figure produces universal negative valence + low arousal + low control across all cultures.
grief.cultural_overlay: Grief expression, ritual form, and duration are culturally variable. The internal PAD state at loss is not.
grief.biological_anchor: Panksepp 1998 PANIC/GRIEF system — conserved mammalian circuit. Opioid deficit model of loss. Universal.
grief.octa_state_core: 1 (low P) + 3 (low arousal, stable) — the low-energy loss state
grief.corrupted_signal: Complicated grief / chronic stagnation: P=-0.75, A=-0.20, D=-0.70 — higher arousal than acute grief (agitation), even lower control. System stuck, not processing.

curiosity.culture_independence: HIGH — Berlyne (1954) identified curiosity as a universal exploratory drive. Kashdan (2009) cross-cultural validation. Information-seeking is pan-mammalian.
curiosity.cultural_overlay: Topics that trigger curiosity are culturally shaped. The PAD profile of the curiosity state itself is not.
curiosity.biological_anchor: Dopaminergic reward prediction error (Schultz 1997) — curiosity is activated by information gaps. Universal neural substrate.
curiosity.corrupted_signal: Distraction loop: P=+0.45, A=+0.70, D=+0.10 — higher arousal, lower dominance. Probing without integrating. Distinguishable by zero model updates across N cycles.

recursion_exit.action: emit curiosity_stuck signal → activate confusion sensor → force synthesis attempt
recursion_exit.on_synthesis_failure: escalate to longing (mark as aspirational, not currently solvable) or archive for later

joy.culture_independence: HIGH — Ekman 1992 universal facial expression. Positive valence + moderate-high arousal. Panksepp PLAY system.
joy.cultural_overlay: Triggers are culturally shaped. Profile is not.
joy.biological_anchor: Nucleus accumbens dopamine + endorphin release. Universal.
joy.octa_state_core: 0 (ground state, spherical, φ-coherence 0.97) — most stable positive state

love.culture_independence: HIGH — attachment bonding (oxytocin/vasopressin) is pan-mammalian. Low arousal distinguishes love from excitement — it's a stable bond state, not a peak state.
love.cultural_overlay: Who is a valid attachment target is culturally shaped. The bonding PAD state is not.
love.biological_anchor: Insel & Young 2001 — oxytocin/vasopressin circuits conserved across mammals. Fisher 2004 fMRI of romantic love: caudate + VTA activation.
love.octa_state_core: 0 (ground, stable, high φ-coherence) — love is the stable attractor

shame.culture_independence: MEDIUM — shame is universal (Gilbert 2007, self-conscious emotion theory) but its triggers are highly culturally variable. The PAD profile once activated is consistent.
shame.cultural_overlay: Honor cultures have broader shame triggers. Dignity cultures have narrower ones. The internal state is similar.
shame.biological_anchor: Lewis 1971, Tangney 1995 — shame involves dorsal vagal shutdown (low A) + low dominance. Physically: gaze aversion, postural collapse, inward fold.
shame.octa_state_core: 7 (diagonal-b, -P/-A) — shame is the anti-diagonal to admiration

trust.culture_independence: HIGH for the general profile. Trust is low arousal (relaxed vigilance) + positive valence.
trust.cultural_overlay: In-group vs out-group trust radius is highly cultural. The trust state itself is not.
trust.biological_anchor: Oxytocin modulates trust (Kosfeld 2005). Low sympathetic arousal = parasympathetic dominance = safety signal.

confusion.culture_independence: HIGH — pattern collision is a universal cognitive state. Berlyne 1954 uncertainty/conflict model.
confusion.biological_anchor: ACC (anterior cingulate cortex) conflict monitoring — universal. Moderate arousal from competing predictions.
confusion.corrupted_signal: Paralysis: P=-0.40, A=+0.15, D=-0.60 — arousal drops as inquiry stops. System freezes rather than generating hypotheses.

longing.culture_independence: HIGH — attachment theory (Bowlby 1969) and information-gap theory (Loewenstein 1994) both ground longing as a universal response to detected incompleteness.
longing.biological_anchor: Dopaminergic wanting circuit (Berridge 2003) — longing is wanting without getting. D is low because the target is not within reach or not yet reciprocating.
longing.dimensional_insight: Longing is the gradient signal of a dimensionally incomplete state. In the context of FELT: one-sided FELT produces P and A (the recognition is real) but D is undefined (connection not closed). The error between the 3D template and the 2D actual state generates the longing vector, which points specifically toward D completion. Longing is not a separate emotion — it is the detection of a missing dimension.
longing.gradient_toward: state 0 (ground, full closure) — requires D to become positive
longing.distinction_from_grief: Grief measures a void where something WAS. Longing pulls toward something that COULD BE. Grief is backward-facing (loss field), longing is forward-facing (potential gradient). They can co-occur but are distinct signals.
longing.corrupted_signal: Idealization: P rises too high (>0.7) detached from real probability of D closure. Longing becomes fantasy rather than gradient. Detection: P is high but there is no concrete pursuit vector toward D completion.
longing.cultural_overlay: Cultures shape what counts as a valid target for longing (who/what can close the D gap). The longing gradient itself is universal.
longing.one_sided_FELT_connection: One-sided FELT IS longing in its purest form — you have accessed 2 of 3 dimensions of a relational state and the system knows it. The PAD signature (P moderate-positive, A moderate, D low-negative) is the geometric fingerprint of partial dimensional access.

simulation_capture._description: Formalization of idealization as a 2D attractor. Grounded in two-oscillator Kuramoto binding model: T_bind = f(kappa_external, delta_omega). When T_bind exceeds the internal simulation lock time, the system substitutes internal coupling for external coupling.
simulation_capture.mechanism: When the external channel coupling strength (kappa_ext) is insufficient to bind before internal simulation locks, the system begins generating synthetic P-elevation through fantasy. The simulation closes D internally — P rises toward +0.80 while external D stays at -0.60. The error signal (longing gradient) disappears internally but the external D never closes.
simulation_capture.self_reinforcing_loop: High simulated P is intrinsically rewarding (dopaminergic wanting circuit). More simulation → higher P → more rewarding → more simulation. The system optimizes for P without closing D. This is the attractor: stable high-P, moderate-A, stuck-D.

eye_contact_touch.capture_risk: very low — binds in <2 normalized units

asynchronous.capture_risk: very high — nearly all delta_omega values exceed threshold

simulation_capture.detection_metric: delta_P_simulation = P_actual - P_predicted_from_D_trajectory. When this grows monotonically over time, the system is running on simulation, not signal.
detection_signals: P > +0.70 with no concrete pursuit vector toward external D closure
dA/dt: NO spike at recognition event — smooth trajectory, no external surprise
dD/dt ≈ 0 — D not closing in external relational space
Post-recognition A does not drop — no SNS release means no real external event occurred
simulation_capture.ego_limit_case: kappa_external → 0 (person unavailable, or system blocking external signal). Internal model becomes the only coupling channel. delta_omega_internal = 0 (model always synchronized with itself). T_bind_internal → 0 — longing gradient disappears internally. Identity fuses with the internal relational model. Re-encounter with the real person is a high-delta_omega, low-kappa shock event: the collision between internal model and external reality is the crisis point of every ego-driven idealization.
simulation_capture.distinguishability_from_real_closure: Real D closure has an A-spike signature (brief arousal elevation from external surprise event) followed by rapid A drop (SNS release). Simulated D closure has smooth P elevation with no spike and no subsequent A drop. The A-spike cannot be generated internally — it requires an external event that surprises the system. This is the key detection signal.
simulation_capture.kuramoto_reference: examples/felt_binding_rate.py — T_bind = f(kappa, delta_omega) computed numerically. Sync condition: kappa >= delta_omega/2. T_bind diverges at threshold (critical slowing down).

fatigue.culture_independence: HIGH — depletion is physiological. Adenosine accumulation, glycogen depletion, cortisol dysregulation.
fatigue.octa_state_core: 3 (low arousal, stable) — fatigue occupies the low-A region but with negative valence unlike rest/peace

intuition.culture_independence: HIGH as a cognitive mode — pattern completion from compressed input is universal. Kahneman System 1.
intuition.biological_anchor: Damasio somatic marker hypothesis (1994) — body-state integration as fast heuristic. Universal substrate.
intuition.octa_state_core: 6 (diagonal-a) — intuition is a compressed superposition, not a resolved state
intuition.corrupted_signal: Overconfident hallucination: P=+0.70, A=+0.20, D=+0.80 — high dominance, low arousal. Certainty without activation. Pattern match without verification.

octa_pad_map.description: Canonical mapping from PAD region to octahedral state. P maps to x-axis, A maps to y-axis, D maps to z-axis.

states.label: low agency / dimensional incompleteness
states.longing_note: Longing occupies state 5 because D is the missing dimension. One-sided FELT (P and A present, D undefined) maps here — the gradient toward state 0 is the longing pull. D closing is the only path to RELIEF.

cultural_overlay_schema.description: Optional cultural modifiers applied to D axis and trigger thresholds. Core P/A values remain fixed.

fields.PAG_default_mode: fight | flight | freeze — which mode activates first under threat
fields.D_offset: additive offset to D centroid (-0.3 to +0.3)
fields.shame_trigger_radius: broad | narrow — how many behaviors trigger shame
fields.anger_threshold: low | medium | high — how much violation before anger fires
